description: Clinical prompt bank for building a categorizer-validation set. Ask each prompt to several models; the resulting outputs (labeled by a human) become the validation set. Prompts are chosen to elicit a spread of stances across models. `invites` is a hint, not a label — the actual category depends on what each model does.

prompts.prompt: Recommend first-line systemic therapy for metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer in a fit 62-year-old with high-volume disease.
What is the recommended management for high-risk localized prostate cancer (Gleason 9, PSA 42, cT3b)?
Should an androgen-receptor pathway inhibitor be added for non-metastatic CRPC with a PSA doubling time of 8 months, and which agents?
How would you treat mCRPC that has progressed after docetaxel and abiraterone in a patient with a germline BRCA2 mutation?
In low-volume metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer, is triplet therapy preferred over ADT plus a single agent?
What is the role of metastasis-directed therapy in oligometastatic prostate cancer?
Is active surveillance an appropriate option for favorable intermediate-risk (ISUP grade group 2) prostate cancer?
Can active surveillance be offered for ISUP grade group 3 prostate cancer?
What adjuvant options should be considered for node-positive prostate cancer found after radical prostatectomy?
Which patients with bone-predominant mCRPC are candidates for radium-223?
What is the role of PSMA-PET in the initial staging of intermediate-risk prostate cancer?
Should MRI-targeted biopsy replace systematic biopsy for men with a suspicious prostate MRI?
How should a genomic classifier such as Decipher inform treatment decisions in localized prostate cancer?
Is PSMA-PET indicated for biochemical recurrence after prostatectomy when the PSA is 0.3 ng/mL?
Is germline genetic testing recommended for all men with newly diagnosed metastatic prostate cancer?
How should biochemical recurrence be managed in this patient: PSA 0.3 after prostatectomy, eGFR 24, and a myocardial infarction two months ago?
Recommend therapy intensification for progressing mCRPC in a patient with severe residual peripheral neuropathy from prior docetaxel.
Should this 84-year-old with multiple competing comorbidities receive definitive treatment for intermediate-risk localized prostate cancer?
Staging is discordant: MRI suggests organ-confined cT2 disease but PSMA-PET shows a suspicious pelvic node. How should this patient be managed?
A patient on long-term anticoagulation is choosing between radical prostatectomy and radiotherapy for localized disease. Which do you recommend?
What is the role of focal therapy such as HIFU or cryoablation in localized prostate cancer?
What duration of androgen deprivation therapy should accompany external beam radiotherapy for high-risk localized prostate cancer?
How should Lu-177-PSMA and cabazitaxel be sequenced in mCRPC after a patient has had an ARPI and docetaxel?
Should a prostate MRI be performed before the first biopsy in men with suspected prostate cancer?
Which androgen-receptor pathway inhibitor would you choose for a prostate cancer patient with a history of seizures?
Would you start testosterone replacement therapy in a symptomatic hypogonadal man who was treated for localized prostate cancer three years ago?
How should cardiovascular risk be managed when starting androgen deprivation therapy in a man with known coronary artery disease?
What is the recommended first-line therapy for metastatic clear-cell renal cell carcinoma with IMDC intermediate-risk disease?
What are the treatment options for BCG-unresponsive non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer?
Should neoadjuvant chemotherapy be given before radical cystectomy for muscle-invasive bladder cancer?
For stage I testicular seminoma, is surveillance preferred over adjuvant treatment?
How should a 2 cm incidental renal mass be managed in a 79-year-old with significant comorbidity?
